name: Pomni is Uzi and Jax is N Theory
description:
The “Pomni is Uzi” and “Jax is N” theories are fan-made crossover ideas connecting Murder Drones and The Amazing Digital Circus.

The basic concept is that the characters from Murder Drones somehow end up inside the Digital Circus after the events of their original story, becoming altered versions of themselves.

---

🎭 Pomni is Uzi Theory (Bio)

In this theory, Pomni is actually Uzi Doorman after being trapped in the circus.

Fans connect them because:

Both are anxious, emotionally overwhelmed characters

Both struggle with identity and control

Pomni’s panic and confusion are seen as Uzi trying to cope with losing her old reality

The theory imagines that after everything Uzi experienced, she ends up in the circus with fragmented memories. Her rebellious confidence disappears, turning into Pomni’s nervous, unstable behavior.

So in this interpretation:

> Pomni is Uzi after losing certainty, control, and her sense of reality.

---

🐰 Jax is N Theory (Bio)

This theory reimagines Jax as a future version of N.

Unlike Uzi/Pomni, the contrast here is much bigger:

N is warm, kind, and emotionally open

Jax is sarcastic, detached, and chaotic

Fans interpret this as a drastic personality change caused by trauma or adaptation. After suffering, loss, or emotional exhaustion, N supposedly enters the circus and slowly suppresses his softer side.

In this version:

N’s kindness becomes hidden behind sarcasm

His awkward humor evolves into Jax’s teasing behavior

Emotional vulnerability gets replaced with detachment

So the theory frames Jax as:

> N after learning to survive by treating everything like a joke.

---

🔗 Combined theory
creator: WanderingTerrier3624
